summary: Iteration 160: Complete testing of Quiz System, Did Not Trade Bug Fix, and Admin Spot-Check features. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Quiz Manager admin page and Daily Habits Community Knowledge quiz section.
critical_code_review_comments: ReactMarkdown integration for AI Features confirmed with proper prose styling
Quiz system properly implements generate -> approve -> publish -> answer workflow
Did Not Trade entries correctly show direction='NONE' instead of null
seed_data_creation: Quiz questions already generated and published for 2026-03-10
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz system fully operational with 3 quizzes published for today. 1 already answered correctly. Pending proofs exist for spot-check testing. All quiz admin endpoints (generate, approve, reject, publish) working. Trade logs endpoint returns 'did not trade' entries with direction='NONE' correctly.

did_not_trade_bug_fix.details: GET /api/trade/logs returns 200 with direction='NONE' for did_not_trade entries. No Pydantic validation errors.

quiz_admin_generate.details: POST /api/habits/quiz/admin/generate creates quiz questions via AI

quiz_admin_pool.details: GET /api/habits/quiz/admin/pool supports status and topic filters

quiz_admin_publish.details: POST /api/habits/quiz/admin/publish makes quizzes available for a date

quiz_member_today.details: GET /api/habits/quiz/today returns published quizzes with answer status

quiz_member_answer.details: POST /api/habits/quiz/{id}/answer submits answer with correct/incorrect feedback and explanation

daily_balances_fix.details: actual_profit=0 no longer converted to None due to 0-is-falsy bug

ui_quiz_manager.details: Admin Quiz Manager page shows Generate, Published Quizzes, and Quiz Pool sections with filters

ui_daily_habits_quiz.details: Community Knowledge section shows level, progress, quiz cards with multiple choice options and explanations

sidebar_quiz_link.details: Quiz Manager link visible in ADMIN section of sidebar for super/master admin

markdown_rendering.details: ReactMarkdown component integrated in AIFeatures.jsx with prose-invert styling
